auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Harvest personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in the Developers section of Harvest ID, where Harvest also shows your account IDs: https://help.getharvest.com/api-v2/authentication-api/authentication/authentication/

extraFields.label: Account ID
extraFields.description: Harvest account ID sent with the Harvest-Account-Id header. Harvest shows the available account IDs after you create a personal access token in Harvest ID.

actions.name: create_time_entry
actions.description: Create a new Harvest time entry.

spentDate.description: An ISO 8601 date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

hours.description: The number of decimal hours to record when tracking by duration.

startedTime.description: A time string accepted by Harvest, for example 8:00am or 5:30pm.

endedTime.description: A time string accepted by Harvest, for example 8:00am or 5:30pm.

notes.description: Notes attached to the time entry.

externalReference.description: The external reference object attached to the time entry.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Harvest time entry.

spent_date.description: An ISO 8601 date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

currency.description: The currency code associated with the client.

anyOf.description: A compact Harvest client record.
The project code.

user_assignment.description: The user assignment summary associated with the time entry.

anyOf.description: The external reference attached to the time entry.
The invoice summary attached to the time entry.

hours.description: The number of decimal hours tracked in the time entry.

rounded_hours.description: The rounded number of hours used for billing.

anyOf.description: Notes attached to the time entry.

is_locked.description: Whether the time entry is locked.

is_closed.description: Whether the time entry is closed.

is_billed.description: Whether the time entry has been billed.

anyOf.description: When the running timer was started.
The start time stored on the time entry.
The end time stored on the time entry.

is_running.description: Whether the time entry is currently running.

outputSchema.description: A single Harvest time entry response.

actions.name: delete_time_entry
actions.description: Delete a Harvest time entry by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for mutating a Harvest time entry by ID.

deleted.description: Whether Harvest deleted the requested time entry.

outputSchema.description: The Harvest time entry deletion result.

actions.name: get_client
actions.description: Get a single Harvest client by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a client.

anyOf.description: The address configured for the client.

currency.description: The currency code associated with the client.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current authenticated Harvest user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

timezone.description: The timezone configured for the user.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is an administrator.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get a single Harvest project by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a project.

anyOf.description: The project code.
The project budget when budgeting by time.

currency.description: The currency code associated with the client.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Get a single Harvest task by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a task.

billable_by_default.description: Whether the task is billable by default.

anyOf.description: The default hourly rate used when the task is added to a project.

is_default.description: Whether the task is added to future projects by default.

actions.name: get_time_entry
actions.description: Get a single Harvest time entry by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for mutating a Harvest time entry by ID.

spent_date.description: An ISO 8601 date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

currency.description: The currency code associated with the client.

The project code.

user_assignment.description: The user assignment summary associated with the time entry.

anyOf.description: The external reference attached to the time entry.
The invoice summary attached to the time entry.

hours.description: The number of decimal hours tracked in the time entry.

rounded_hours.description: The rounded number of hours used for billing.

anyOf.description: Notes attached to the time entry.

is_locked.description: Whether the time entry is locked.

is_closed.description: Whether the time entry is closed.

is_billed.description: Whether the time entry has been billed.

The start time stored on the time entry.
The end time stored on the time entry.

is_running.description: Whether the time entry is currently running.

actions.name: list_clients
actions.description: List clients available in the connected Harvest account.

isActive.description: Whether to return only active or only inactive clients.

updatedSince.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with an explicit UTC offset.

perPage.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Harvest clients.

anyOf.description: The address configured for the client.

currency.description: The currency code associated with the client.

per_page.description: The number of records returned per page.

total_pages.description: The total number of pages available.

total_entries.description: The total number of matching records.

anyOf.description: The next page number when another page is available.
The previous page number when a prior page is available.
The URL for the first page of results.
The URL for the next page of results.
The URL for the previous page of results.
The URL for the last page of results.

actions.name: list_project_task_assignments
actions.description: List task assignments for a specific Harvest project.

perPage.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Harvest task assignments for a project.

billable.description: Whether the task assignment is billable.

is_active.description: Whether the task assignment is active.

anyOf.description: The hourly rate used when the project bills by task.
The budget used when the project budgets by task.
The project code.

items.description: A Harvest project task assignment record.

task_assignments.description: The project task assignments returned by Harvest.

per_page.description: The number of records returned per page.

total_pages.description: The total number of pages available.

total_entries.description: The total number of matching records.

anyOf.description: The next page number when another page is available.
The previous page number when a prior page is available.
The URL for the first page of results.
The URL for the next page of results.
The URL for the previous page of results.
The URL for the last page of results.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Harvest project task assignment list.
